property.caption: API URL
property.description: String attribute containing the backend Lambda API endpoint URL.

property.caption: S3 Bucket Name
property.description: Name of the S3 bucket for file attachments (e.g. lcl-ai-skills)

property.caption: S3 Region
property.description: AWS region of the S3 bucket (e.g. ap-south-1)

property.caption: S3 Key Prefix
property.description: Folder prefix for uploaded files (e.g. attachements-input)

property.caption: AWS Access Key ID
property.description: AWS Access Key ID for S3 uploads. Store securely in Mendix.

property.caption: AWS Secret Access Key
property.description: AWS Secret Access Key for S3 uploads. Store securely in Mendix.

property.caption: Widget Title
property.description: Title shown in the chat header

property.caption: Input Placeholder
property.description: Placeholder text for the message input

property.caption: Max Height
property.description: Max height of the chat window (e.g. 600px, 80vh)

property.caption: Default Dark Mode
property.description: Start in dark mode by default (user can toggle in UI)

property.caption: Render Markdown
property.description: Render AI responses as rich Markdown

property.caption: Show Copy Button
property.description: Show copy button on AI messages

property.caption: Typing Animation
property.description: Show animated typing indicator

property.caption: Allow File Upload
property.description: Enable file attachments

property.caption: Accepted File Types
property.description: Comma-separated file extensions

property.caption: Max File Size (MB)
property.description: Maximum file size per attachment

property.caption: Disabled
property.description: Disable the chat input

property.caption: Auto Scroll
property.description: Auto scroll to latest message

property.caption: Enable Chat History Sidebar
property.description: Show the left sidebar listing the user's previous chat sessions. Requires chatHistoryJson and onHistoryChange to be configured.

property.caption: Chat History JSON
property.description: String attribute on the ChatHistory entity that stores all sessions as JSON.

property.caption: On History Change
property.description: Action that is called whenever the chat history changes (e.g. new message, new session).

property.caption: On Share Session
property.description: Microflow called when the user clicks the Share button on a chat session.

property.caption: Shared Session ID
property.description: String attribute the widget sets to the session ID before calling the On Share Session microflow

property.caption: User Email
property.description: Current user email sent with API requests for usage trackings.

property.caption: Input Tokens
property.description: Number of input tokens used in the last API request

property.caption: Output Tokens
property.description: Number of output tokens used in the last API request

property.caption: Total Cost
property.description: Total cost of API requests

property.caption: On API Usage
property.description: Microflow called after each API response with token usage
